subcodes.first_line: O flowers and fragrant herbs of the celestial Paradise of the love of God! The revered Samandar, that blazing divine fire, hath offered abundant praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گل و ریاحین بهشت برین محبت الله حضرت سمندر نار موقده الهیه ستایشی مفصل از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
